seoTitle: Strangways vs Stratford — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Strangways and Stratford. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Strangways and Stratford.
heading: Strangways vs Stratford — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Strangways, Victoria and Stratford, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Strangways has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Stratford (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Strangways or Stratford safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Strangways has a flood risk score of 21/100, while Stratford scores 51/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Strangways scores 17/100 for bushfire risk. Stratford scores 21/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Strangways or Stratford?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Strangways has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.75% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
